extension.description: Regardez les vidéos de Arte +7 Pour toute demande ou reporter un problème: https://github.com/thomas-ernest/plugin.video.arteplussept/issues Les contributions sont les bienvenues: https://github.com/thomas-ernest/plugin.video.arteplussept

Sehen Sie Videos von Arte +7 Für Fehlerberichte und Verbesserungsvorschläge: https://github.com/thomas-ernest/plugin.video.arteplussept/issues Mithilfe ist willkommen: https://github.com/thomas-ernest/plugin.video.arteplussept

Watch videos from Arte +7 For feature requests / issues: https://github.com/thomas-ernest/plugin.video.arteplussept/issues Contributions are welcome: https://github.com/thomas-ernest/plugin.video.arteplussept

Guarda video da Arte +7 Per richiedere nuove funzionalità o segnalare problemi: https://github.com/thomas-ernest/plugin.video.arteplussept/issues Nuovi contributi sono ben accetti: https://github.com/thomas-ernest/plugin.video.arteplussept

Oglądaj wideos z Arte +7 W przypadku problemów lub próśb o ulepszenie: https://github.com/thomas-ernest/plugin.video.arteplussept/issues Każda pomoc mile widziana: https://github.com/thomas-ernest/plugin.video.arteplussept
extension.news:
1.5.3 (2026-7-18) Fix next page navigation and error messages for non authenticated users
- Fix next page navigation, when zone_id was made of a duplicated uuid separated with a _. Made code compatible with unexpected value returned by Arte TV API. - Smarter warning notification instead of error and warning messages for non authenticated users. A single warning is displayed, when a user tries to do something requiering auth. Not at start-up and in unconsistent way.
